meta.title: Free, legal digital libraries for e-books, organized by language
meta.scope: Sources that provide free, legal access to complete book-length texts (e-books, scanned volumes, or machine-readable text corpora). Shadow libraries (Library Genesis, Z-Library, Anna's Archive, Sci-Hub and similar) are deliberately excluded as not legal. Subscription-only services are excluded; freemium services with a substantial free tier are included and marked.

field_definitions.access: free = no account needed; free_with_registration = free account required for some or all content; freemium = meaningful free tier plus paid tier
field_definitions.api: true = documented programmatic interface; partial = machine-readable access exists but is limited, undocumented, or metadata-only (e.g. OAI-PMH harvesting, IIIF, git repositories, static data dumps); false = no programmatic access
field_definitions.search: true if the site offers search; search_details distinguishes full-text search from metadata/catalog search
field_definitions.bulk_download: true = whole-corpus or large-batch download is supported and permitted; partial = per-title downloads or bulk by arrangement
field_definitions.confidence: high = verified or well-established and stable; medium = believed correct but details (especially API endpoints) should be verified before building on them; low = uncertain, verify before relying on it

jurisdiction_caveats: Public domain status varies by country. US-based sites generally apply the US rule (publication before a rolling cutoff year, currently pre-1931); Canadian sites (Faded Page, Project Gutenberg Canada) apply Canadian terms; European sites generally apply life of the author plus 70 years. A text legally downloadable from one site may still be in copyright where you live.

Project Gutenberg applies US public domain rules. A site-wide block of German IP addresses imposed in 2018 after the S. Fischer Verlag lawsuit was lifted under a 2021 settlement; only the specific disputed authors' titles remain blocked in Germany until their German copyrights expire.
HathiTrust full-view access depends on your location: users outside the US see a smaller public domain set than US users.
The National Library of Norway (nb.no) shows in-copyright Norwegian books only to Norwegian IP addresses; public domain material is open to all.

For biblical and classical texts, the ancient text itself is public domain but modern critical editions and apparatus (e.g. NA28, BHS apparatus, Rahlfs-Hanhart 2006) are copyrighted. The reliably free-to-redistribute editions are noted per entry.

The British Library is still recovering from its October 2023 cyber-attack. Its new main catalogue went live around January 2026 and EThOS returned in July 2026, but some digital services remain in phased restoration.
meta.coverage_note: Languages with thin dedicated ecosystems are best served through the multilingual aggregators (Internet Archive, Wikisource language subdomains, HathiTrust); the by-language sections list the strongest dedicated collections.

multilingual_general.name: Internet Archive
multilingual_general.description: Largest open scan repository; millions of public domain books in most written languages, plus a controlled lending program for some in-copyright titles.
multilingual_general.api_details: Advanced Search API (JSON), Metadata API, Scrape API, IIIF image service, and the official ia command-line client for bulk work.
multilingual_general.search_details: Metadata search plus full-text search across OCRed volumes.
multilingual_general.notes: Public domain items are unrestricted; lending items require an account and are US-litigation constrained.

multilingual_general.name: Open Library
multilingual_general.description: Internet Archive's catalog front end; one record per book with read links into Archive.org copies.
multilingual_general.api_details: REST JSON APIs for search, books, works, authors, and covers; full monthly data dumps of the catalog.
multilingual_general.search_details: Catalog and metadata search; full text is searched via the underlying Archive items.

multilingual_general.name: HathiTrust
multilingual_general.description: Academic scan repository of roughly 18 million volumes in 400+ languages; full view for public domain items.
multilingual_general.api_details: Bibliographic API (identifier lookup, JSON) remains; the content-level Data API was retired in July 2024. Bulk metadata via OAI feed and Hathifiles; computational text analysis via HTRC Extracted Features datasets.
multilingual_general.search_details: Full-text search across the whole corpus, including in-copyright works (snippet-level for restricted items).
multilingual_general.notes: Full-view coverage differs for US and non-US users.

multilingual_general.name: Project Gutenberg
multilingual_general.description: The original e-book library; 75,000+ hand-proofed public domain e-books, mostly English but with significant French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Finnish, Dutch and other holdings.
multilingual_general.api_details: No official REST API. Official bulk access via the complete RDF and CSV catalog dumps and sanctioned mirroring. The third-party Gutendex project (gutendex.com) provides a free JSON REST API over the catalog.
multilingual_general.search_details: Site search over titles, authors, and subjects; full-text search is limited.
multilingual_general.notes: Clean EPUB, Kindle, HTML, and plain-text formats make it the easiest large corpus to ingest.

multilingual_general.name: Wikisource (all language subdomains)
multilingual_general.description: Wikimedia's transcription library with 70+ language editions; proofread public domain and freely licensed texts, from major literatures to Latin, Ancient Greek, Hebrew, Sanskrit, and Armenian.
multilingual_general.api_details: Full MediaWiki Action and REST APIs on every subdomain, complete XML dumps, and the WSExport tool for on-demand EPUB, PDF, and MOBI generation. One integration covers every language edition.
multilingual_general.search_details: Full-text search via CirrusSearch, exposed through the API.

multilingual_general.name: Europeana
multilingual_general.description: Aggregator for European cultural heritage institutions; millions of digitized books among 50+ million objects, with per-item rights statements.
multilingual_general.api_details: Search API, Record API, IIIF, and SPARQL; free API key required.
multilingual_general.search_details: Metadata search with rights filtering; full text only where partners supply it (notably newspapers).

multilingual_general.name: Google Books
multilingual_general.description: Full view and EPUB/PDF download for scanned public domain books; snippet or preview for the rest.
multilingual_general.api_details: Google Books API v1 for search and metadata (API key); programmatic full-text retrieval is not offered.
multilingual_general.search_details: Full-text search across the entire scanned corpus, one of the deepest search indexes anywhere.

multilingual_general.name: Library of Congress Digital Collections
multilingual_general.description: US national library digital collections, including the absorbed World Digital Library, with books, manuscripts, and maps in many languages.
multilingual_general.api_details: The loc.gov JSON API (append fo=json to most URLs) plus IIIF; no key required.
multilingual_general.search_details: Metadata search with faceting; full text where OCR exists.

multilingual_general.name: Digital Public Library of America (DPLA)
multilingual_general.description: US aggregator linking out to member institutions' digitized books and archives.
multilingual_general.api_details: REST API with free key; bulk metadata downloads.
multilingual_general.search_details: Metadata search; content is hosted by partners.
multilingual_general.notes: Organizationally leaner than it once was; verify service levels before depending on the API.

multilingual_general.name: ManyBooks
multilingual_general.description: Free e-books, largely repackaged public domain plus author-submitted free titles, in several languages.

multilingual_general.name: Internet Sacred Text Archive
multilingual_general.description: Long-running archive of religion, mythology, and folklore texts, mostly older English translations of world scriptures.

multilingual_general.name: Bloom Library
multilingual_general.description: SIL-run library of Creative Commons books, strongest for minority and low-resource languages; hundreds of languages represented.
multilingual_general.api_details: Open data orientation and downloadable books; no prominent public query API.
multilingual_general.search_details: Search and filter by language and level.

multilingual_general.name: StoryWeaver (Pratham Books)
multilingual_general.description: Creative Commons children's books in 350+ languages with translation tooling; strong for Indian and African languages.
multilingual_general.api_details: Openly licensed content and downloads; public API status unclear.
multilingual_general.search_details: Search by language, level, and theme.

multilingual_general.name: African Storybook
multilingual_general.description: Openly licensed picture books in 200+ African languages.

scholarly_open_access_books.name: Directory of Open Access Books (DOAB)
scholarly_open_access_books.description: Index of 80,000+ peer-reviewed open access academic books across languages, linking to full texts at publishers and OAPEN.
scholarly_open_access_books.api_details: OAI-PMH harvesting plus REST endpoints (DSpace-based); full metadata exports.
scholarly_open_access_books.search_details: Metadata search with subject and language facets.

scholarly_open_access_books.name: OAPEN Library
scholarly_open_access_books.description: Hosted full-text repository for open access monographs, mostly humanities and social sciences, in English, German, French, Dutch, Italian and more.
scholarly_open_access_books.api_details: OAI-PMH and DSpace REST API; bulk-friendly.
scholarly_open_access_books.search_details: Metadata search; PDFs downloadable per title.

scholarly_open_access_books.name: OpenEdition Books
scholarly_open_access_books.description: French-centered open access platform for humanities monographs; HTML reading free for most titles, PDF and EPUB sometimes paywalled (freemium).

scholarly_open_access_books.name: SciELO Books
scholarly_open_access_books.description: Latin American academic books, largely open access, in Portuguese and Spanish.
scholarly_open_access_books.api_details: OAI-PMH metadata; per-title PDF and EPUB downloads.

scholarly_open_access_books.name: Open Textbook Library
scholarly_open_access_books.description: Curated index of openly licensed college textbooks, mostly English.

english.name: Standard Ebooks
english.description: Carefully typeset, modernized editions of public domain literature; the highest production quality among free English e-book sources.
english.api_details: OPDS, Atom, and RSS feeds of the whole catalog; all source files on GitHub. No search API.

english.name: Faded Page
english.description: Canadian equivalent of Project Gutenberg; includes 20th-century authors public domain in Canada but not the US.
english.notes: Check your local copyright law before downloading post-1930 titles.

english.name: Project Gutenberg Australia
english.description: Australian public domain texts, including works still copyrighted in the US.
english.search_details: Basic site search and author indexes.

english.name: Project Gutenberg Canada
english.description: Canadian public domain e-books, complementary to Faded Page.

english.name: LibriVox
english.description: Volunteer-read public domain audiobooks (included here as the audio complement to the text libraries), primarily English with other languages represented.
english.api_details: Documented JSON API for the catalog; audio files hosted on Internet Archive.
english.search_details: Catalog search by title, author, language, and reader.

english.name: Christian Classics Ethereal Library (CCEL)
english.description: English translations of patristic, medieval, and Reformation Christian classics, including the standard Ante-Nicene and Nicene Fathers sets.
english.api_details: None; per-title downloads in several formats.

english.name: The Online Books Page
english.description: Curated index (University of Pennsylvania) of 3+ million free books hosted elsewhere; the best human-maintained map of the free English e-book landscape.
english.search_details: Author, title, and subject search over the index.

english.name: Trove (National Library of Australia)
english.description: Australian aggregator with digitized books, newspapers, and journals.
english.api_details: Trove API v3 with free key; well documented.

english.name: Oxford Text Archive
english.description: Long-running scholarly archive of literary and linguistic e-texts, many in TEI XML.
english.api_details: Per-item TEI downloads; no query API.

english.name: Text Creation Partnership (EEBO-TCP, ECCO-TCP, Evans-TCP)
english.description: Keyed transcriptions of tens of thousands of early modern English books (1473-1800), released into the public domain.
english.api_details: Complete TEI XML corpora on GitHub; searchable interfaces hosted at the University of Michigan.

english.name: OpenStax
english.description: Peer-reviewed, openly licensed college textbooks; free PDF and web reading.

english.name: British Library
english.description: UK national library; digitized manuscripts and collection items are returning online after the October 2023 cyber-attack, with the new catalogue live and EThOS restored in July 2026.
english.api_details: Historic APIs and datasets were disrupted by the attack; verify current availability of any specific service before building on it.
english.search_details: New Alma and Primo based catalogue search; digital item coverage still expanding.

french.name: Gallica (Bibliotheque nationale de France)
french.description: One of the world's great digital libraries: 10+ million documents including hundreds of thousands of French books, plus Latin, Greek, and Arabic holdings.
french.api_details: SRU search API, Document API, OAI-PMH, and full IIIF Image and Presentation APIs; excellent documentation.

french.name: Wikisource francophone
french.description: One of the largest and best-proofread Wikisource editions; strong classic French literature coverage with EPUB export.
french.api_details: MediaWiki API and dumps; WSExport for e-book generation.

french.name: Ebooks libres et gratuits
french.description: Volunteer-made EPUBs of public domain French literature.

french.name: Bibliotheque electronique du Quebec (BEQ)
french.description: Clean PDF and EPUB editions of French and Quebecois classics.

french.name: Bibliotheque numerique romande
french.description: Swiss volunteer project producing quality EPUBs of francophone public domain works.

french.name: Canadiana
french.description: Digitized Canadian print heritage in French and English; free since 2018.
french.api_details: IIIF for images; metadata search interface.

german.name: Projekt Gutenberg-DE
german.description: The main German-language literature portal (unrelated to the US Project Gutenberg); free online reading of thousands of German classics.
german.api_details: None; reading is browser-based and downloads are not the focus.

german.name: Zeno.org
german.description: Very large German full-text library spanning literature, philosophy, reference works, and art.

german.name: Deutsches Textarchiv (DTA)
german.description: Scholarly TEI corpus of German texts 1600-1900 with linguistic annotation; the best machine-readable historical German source.
german.api_details: OAI-PMH, per-text TEI and plain-text downloads, whole-corpus downloads, and CLARIN-D linguistic web services (DDC search API).

german.name: Munchener DigitalisierungsZentrum (MDZ / digitale-sammlungen.de)
german.description: Bavarian State Library scans: 3+ million volumes including vast early modern German and Latin holdings.
german.api_details: Public API portal with IIIF Image and Presentation plus OAI-PMH.

german.name: Deutsche Digitale Bibliothek
german.description: German national aggregator across libraries, archives, and museums.

german.name: e-rara
german.description: Swiss libraries' platform for digitized rare prints, strong in German, Latin, and French early modern books.
german.search_details: Metadata search; full text where OCRed.

german.name: Wikisource (deutsch)
german.description: Rigorously sourced German transcriptions, strong for 19th-century works and reference material.

spanish.name: Biblioteca Virtual Miguel de Cervantes
spanish.description: The flagship Hispanic digital library: hundreds of thousands of records for Spanish and Latin American literature, many with full text.
spanish.api_details: Linked open data platform (data.cervantesvirtual.com) with SPARQL endpoint plus OAI-PMH; no simple REST content API.

spanish.name: Biblioteca Digital Hispanica (BNE)
spanish.description: Spanish National Library scans: manuscripts, incunabula, and books.
spanish.api_details: OAI-PMH; related BNE linked-data SPARQL service at datos.bne.es.
spanish.search_details: Metadata search; viewer-level text search where OCRed.

spanish.name: Elejandria
spanish.description: Free Spanish e-books, public domain and Creative Commons, in EPUB and PDF.

spanish.name: textos.info
spanish.description: Public domain Spanish-language e-books with EPUB and Kindle downloads.

spanish.name: Memoria Chilena
spanish.description: National Library of Chile's thematic digital library with thousands of downloadable PDFs of Chilean books and documents.

spanish.name: Wikisource en espanol
spanish.description: Spanish-language Wikisource with classic literature and historical documents.

portuguese.name: Dominio Publico (Brazil)
portuguese.description: Brazilian government portal with thousands of public domain Portuguese works, including the complete Machado de Assis.
portuguese.search_details: Catalog search by author, title, and category.

portuguese.name: Biblioteca Nacional Digital (Portugal)
portuguese.description: National Library of Portugal scans of books, manuscripts, and maps.

portuguese.name: Projeto Adamastor
portuguese.description: Volunteer-made EPUB editions of Portuguese-language public domain literature.

portuguese.name: Wikisource em portugues
portuguese.description: Portuguese Wikisource with Brazilian and Portuguese classics.

italian.name: Liber Liber
italian.description: The main Italian free e-book project; thousands of public domain works in EPUB and ODT plus audiobooks.

italian.name: Wikisource in italiano
italian.description: Highly active Italian Wikisource with strong classic literature coverage and EPUB export.

italian.name: Biblioteca Italiana
italian.description: Scholarly TEI digital library of Italian literary tradition from the Middle Ages onward (Sapienza University).
italian.api_details: None public; TEI underlies the site.

italian.name: Internet Culturale
italian.description: Italian national aggregator of digitized library holdings.
italian.notes: Service reliability has been uneven historically.

dutch.name: DBNL (Digitale Bibliotheek voor de Nederlandse Letteren)
dutch.description: The definitive Dutch and Flemish literature library; thousands of complete works, many with EPUB and PDF downloads.
dutch.api_details: Per-title downloads; bulk text sets available for research by arrangement with the KB; no public query API.

dutch.name: Delpher
dutch.description: KB (Dutch national library) platform with millions of digitized book, newspaper, and journal pages.
dutch.api_details: Harvesting and datasets available under KB conditions rather than an open public API.

nordic_languages.name: National Library of Norway (nb.no)
nordic_languages.description: Essentially every book ever published in Norway, digitized; public domain open worldwide, in-copyright readable from Norwegian IP addresses.
nordic_languages.api_details: Documented public API (api.nb.no) plus the DH-lab text analysis APIs; unusually good for computational work.
nordic_languages.search_details: Full-text search across the national corpus.

nordic_languages.name: Litteraturbanken
nordic_languages.description: Swedish literary classics in reliable editions with EPUB downloads and scholarly commentary.
nordic_languages.api_details: JSON endpoints power the site and are usable, but documentation is thin.

nordic_languages.name: Project Runeberg
nordic_languages.description: Volunteer-scanned Nordic literature (Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Finnish, Icelandic) since 1992.
nordic_languages.api_details: None; predictable static URL structure makes scraping straightforward.

nordic_languages.name: Arkiv for Dansk Litteratur (tekster.kb.dk)
nordic_languages.description: Danish Royal Library's scholarly editions of classic Danish literature.

nordic_languages.name: Projekti Lonnrot
nordic_languages.description: The Finnish Project Gutenberg equivalent: proofread public domain Finnish and Swedish e-texts.

nordic_languages.name: Digi (National Library of Finland)
nordic_languages.description: Digitized Finnish newspapers, journals, and books.
nordic_languages.api_details: OAI-PMH and open data exports for out-of-copyright material.

polish.name: Wolne Lektury
polish.description: Poland's flagship free library: thousands of school-canon and classic works in EPUB, MOBI, PDF, and audio.
polish.api_details: Documented public REST API covering the whole catalog.

polish.name: Polona
polish.description: National Library of Poland's massive scan portal.
polish.search_details: Metadata search; OCR text for many items.

polish.name: Federacja Bibliotek Cyfrowych
polish.api_details: OAI-PMH based aggregation with some open endpoints.

czech.name: Czech Digital Library / Kramerius (NDK)
czech.description: National Digital Library of the Czech Republic on the Kramerius platform; public domain items fully open.
czech.api_details: Kramerius REST API (documented) plus IIIF on modern instances.
czech.notes: Some in-copyright material is limited to on-site or Czech library access under the DNNT scheme.

czech.name: Municipal Library of Prague e-knihovna
czech.description: Free, well-formatted EPUB and PDF editions of Czech classics produced by the Prague municipal library.

hungarian.name: Magyar Elektronikus Konyvtar (MEK)
hungarian.description: Hungarian Electronic Library at the national library; tens of thousands of free Hungarian e-books.

modern_greek.name: Anemi
modern_greek.description: University of Crete digital library of modern Greek studies; large downloadable PDF collection.

modern_greek.name: OpenBook.gr
modern_greek.description: Free modern Greek e-books under open licenses.

modern_greek.name: Wikisource (Vikithiki)
modern_greek.description: Greek Wikisource covering modern, katharevousa, and ancient texts.

russian.name: Lib.ru (Biblioteka Moshkova)
russian.description: The oldest large Russian text library (with satellites like az.lib.ru for classics), built on author permissions and public domain.
russian.api_details: None; plain HTML and text files.
russian.search_details: Basic search and deep author indexes.

russian.name: National Electronic Library (NEB / rusneb.ru)
russian.description: Russian state digital library with large public domain holdings viewable free.
russian.notes: Access from outside Russia can be inconsistent.

russian.name: ImWerden
russian.description: Non-commercial library of Russian literature PDFs and DjVu, run from Germany with attention to rights.

russian.name: Wikisource (Vikiteka)
russian.description: Russian Wikisource with classic literature and historical documents.

ukrainian.name: Diasporiana
ukrainian.description: Digitized Ukrainian diaspora publications; thousands of free PDFs.

turkish.name: Ministry of Culture e-kitap
turkish.description: Turkish Ministry of Culture free PDFs of Turkish classics, folklore, and scholarship.

arabic.name: Al-Maktaba al-Shamela
arabic.description: The dominant classical Arabic library: thousands of works of tafsir, hadith, fiqh, history, and literature, online and via desktop app.
arabic.api_details: No official API; the desktop library is downloadable in bulk and community-made structured dumps circulate on GitHub.
arabic.search_details: Powerful full-text search across the entire corpus.

arabic.name: Hindawi Foundation
arabic.description: Cairo-based foundation publishing beautifully produced free Arabic e-books: modern works, translations, and Nahda-era classics in EPUB, Kindle, and PDF.
arabic.notes: Distinct from the former academic journal publisher hindawi.com.

arabic.name: Arabic Collections Online (ACO)
arabic.description: NYU-led consortium with 20,000+ public domain Arabic books scanned cover to cover.
arabic.api_details: No documented public API; standard repository infrastructure underneath.
arabic.search_details: Catalog search in Arabic and transliteration.

arabic.name: OpenITI
arabic.description: Machine-readable corpus of thousands of premodern Arabic (and some Persian) texts in a standardized markdown format, built for computational analysis.
arabic.api_details: Entire corpus on GitHub with versioned releases on Zenodo; git access substitutes for an API.
arabic.search_details: No hosted search; designed for local processing.

arabic.name: Qatar Digital Library
arabic.description: Gulf history and Arabic scientific manuscripts digitized from British Library and Qatar collections.

persian.name: Ganjoor
persian.description: The standard free library of classical Persian poetry (Hafez, Rumi, Ferdowsi, Saadi and hundreds more).
persian.api_details: Open REST API (api.ganjoor.net) with the service code on GitHub.

hebrew_modern.name: Project Ben-Yehuda
hebrew_modern.description: The Hebrew Project Gutenberg: public domain modern Hebrew literature, poetry, and translations.
hebrew_modern.api_details: Full public domain corpus dump published on GitHub for text analysis; site API limited.

hebrew_modern.name: National Library of Israel
hebrew_modern.description: Digitized Hebrew and Judaica books, manuscripts, and newspapers.
hebrew_modern.api_details: Documented NLI API (api.nli.org.il, key required) plus IIIF for many collections.
hebrew_modern.search_details: Strong catalog search; full-text for newspaper archives.

hebrew_modern.name: HebrewBooks.org
hebrew_modern.description: 60,000+ scanned rabbinic and Hebrew books as free PDFs.
hebrew_modern.search_details: OCR full-text search across the collection.

hebrew_modern.name: Wikisource (Vikitekst)
hebrew_modern.description: Hebrew Wikisource; exceptionally active for Jewish canonical texts alongside modern literature.

yiddish.name: Yiddish Book Center (Steven Spielberg Digital Yiddish Library)
yiddish.description: 11,000+ digitized Yiddish books, essentially the whole surviving Yiddish literary canon, free to read and download.
yiddish.api_details: None; hosting is via Internet Archive, so Archive APIs partially apply.
yiddish.search_details: Full-text OCR search across the collection.

hindi_urdu.name: Rekhta
hindi_urdu.description: The premier Urdu portal: enormous poetry corpus in Urdu, Devanagari, and Roman scripts plus tens of thousands of scanned e-books.
hindi_urdu.search_details: Excellent search across poets, couplets, and books.

hindi_urdu.name: Hindi Samay
hindi_urdu.description: University-run free library of modern Hindi literature.

sanskrit_and_indic.name: GRETIL
sanskrit_and_indic.description: Gottingen register of machine-readable Sanskrit (and other Indic) e-texts; the standard scholarly starting point, now in TEI.

sanskrit_and_indic.name: Digital Corpus of Sanskrit
sanskrit_and_indic.description: Lemmatized, morphologically analyzed Sanskrit corpus for linguistic research.
sanskrit_and_indic.api_details: Corpus data published on GitHub; web interface for queries.

sanskrit_and_indic.name: Sanskrit Documents
sanskrit_and_indic.description: Large volunteer collection of Sanskrit texts in multiple encodings and scripts.

sanskrit_and_indic.name: Muktabodha Digital Library
sanskrit_and_indic.description: Searchable e-texts and manuscript scans of tantric and agamic Sanskrit literature.

sanskrit_and_indic.name: TITUS
sanskrit_and_indic.description: Frankfurt's Indo-European text server: Sanskrit, Avestan, Old Persian, Gothic, Old Church Slavonic and many more.

sanskrit_and_indic.name: National Digital Library of India
sanskrit_and_indic.description: Indian government aggregator of educational and cultural content across Indian languages.

chinese.name: Chinese Text Project (ctext.org)
chinese.description: The standard open library for premodern Chinese: classics, histories, and philosophy with dictionaries and parallel translations.
chinese.api_details: Documented JSON API (with usage tiers) plus a Python library; crowdsourced OCR layer for additional texts.

chinese.name: Kanseki Repository (Kanripo)
chinese.description: Scholarly repository of premodern Chinese texts maintained as version-controlled files.
chinese.api_details: Entire corpus on GitHub; git access substitutes for an API.

chinese.name: CBETA
chinese.description: The Chinese Buddhist canon (Taisho and beyond) in carefully proofread digital form.
chinese.api_details: Complete TEI XML on GitHub; CBETA Online reader has internal JSON endpoints but no formally documented public API.

chinese.name: Wikisource (zhongwen weijiwenku)
chinese.description: Chinese Wikisource, strong for classical and historical documents.

japanese.name: Aozora Bunko
japanese.description: The Japanese public domain library: 17,000+ carefully proofread works of modern Japanese literature with ruby annotations.
japanese.api_details: No official API, but the complete site including all texts and the index CSV is mirrored on GitHub (github.com/aozorabunko), and community APIs exist. The ruby markup format is well documented for parsing.
japanese.search_details: Author and title search; no official full-text search.

japanese.name: NDL Digital Collections (National Diet Library)
japanese.description: Japan's national library scans: out-of-copyright books, rare materials, and (for registered users in Japan) a huge lending layer.
japanese.api_details: NDL Search external interfaces (SRU, OpenSearch, OAI-PMH) plus IIIF on the digital collections; well documented.
japanese.search_details: Metadata search plus growing OCR full-text search.

japanese.name: Wikisource (Wikibunko)
japanese.description: Japanese Wikisource with historical documents and literature.

korean.name: National Library of Korea
korean.description: Digitized Korean books and old and rare materials.
korean.api_details: Open API program for bibliographic data (Korean-language documentation, key required).

korean.name: Institute for the Translation of Korean Classics (ITKC DB)
korean.description: Comprehensive database of classical Korean texts (in Hanmun) with modern Korean translations.

vietnamese.name: Nom Foundation Digital Library
vietnamese.description: Digitized Han-Nom texts and tools for Vietnam's pre-Latin literary heritage.

thai.name: Vajirayana Digital Library
thai.description: Free, well-formatted editions of Thai literary classics and historical works.

indonesian.name: iPusnas
indonesian.description: Indonesian National Library's free e-book lending app, including in-copyright titles.

koine_greek.name: Perseus Digital Library / Scaife Viewer
koine_greek.description: The core open library for ancient Greek: classical and Hellenistic authors with morphology, lexica (LSJ), and aligned translations; Koine-era authors well represented.
koine_greek.api_details: CTS APIs behind Scaife plus complete TEI XML repositories on GitHub (PerseusDL canonical-greekLit); CC BY-SA licensed.

koine_greek.name: Open Greek and Latin / First1KGreek
koine_greek.description: TEI XML editions of Greek texts from the first thousand years CE not in Perseus, including much patristic and technical Koine prose.
koine_greek.api_details: Full corpus on GitHub (OpenGreekAndLatin/First1KGreek); served through Scaife with CTS identifiers.

koine_greek.name: SBLGNT + MorphGNT
koine_greek.description: The SBL Greek New Testament: a modern critical text free to download and redistribute, with full morphological tagging in the companion MorphGNT project.
koine_greek.api_details: Static downloads (plain text, XML, OSIS); MorphGNT data on GitHub.
koine_greek.search_details: No hosted search; designed for download.

koine_greek.name: Nestle 1904 Greek New Testament
koine_greek.description: Public domain Nestle 1904 GNT with morphology, the least-encumbered tagged Greek NT available.

koine_greek.name: STEP Bible
koine_greek.description: Tyndale House's free study platform with tagged Greek NT and LXX resources; underlying tagged datasets (TAGNT, TAHOT) are CC BY on GitHub.
koine_greek.api_details: Data repositories on GitHub (STEPBible-Data); the web app itself has no public API.
koine_greek.search_details: Sophisticated lemma, morphology, and interlinear search.

koine_greek.name: Thesaurus Linguae Graecae (TLG)
koine_greek.description: The comprehensive corpus of Greek literature from Homer to Byzantium; full corpus is subscription, but the Abridged TLG and the TLG Canon are free with registration.
koine_greek.search_details: Best-in-class lemmatized full-corpus search (in the licensed tiers; abridged tier is smaller).

koine_greek.name: Kata Biblon
koine_greek.description: Parsed Greek Septuagint and Wiki English translation alongside the GNT.

koine_greek.name: CCAT / CATSS Septuagint materials (UPenn)
koine_greek.description: The classic morphologically analyzed LXX (Rahlfs-based) and parallel Hebrew-Greek alignment files.
koine_greek.api_details: Plain files after agreeing to a user declaration; a venerable but dated distribution.
koine_greek.notes: License permits scholarly use but not unrestricted redistribution.

koine_greek.name: Academic-bible.com (German Bible Society)
koine_greek.description: Free online reading of the current scholarly editions: NA28, UBS5, and Rahlfs LXX.
koine_greek.api_details: None; reading only, no downloads (the editions are copyrighted).

koine_greek.name: Center for New Testament Restoration (CNTR)
koine_greek.description: Aligned transcriptions of the earliest Greek NT manuscripts plus a computer-generated critical text, all openly licensed.
koine_greek.api_details: Data on GitHub; site provides collation views.

koine_greek.name: Documenta Catholica Omnia (Migne Patrologia Graeca)
koine_greek.description: Free PDFs of the Migne Patrologia Graeca volumes, the workhorse (if dated) edition of the Greek church fathers.
koine_greek.search_details: Index browsing; the PDFs are scans of old typography.

koine_greek.name: Wikisource (Ancient Greek texts on el.wikisource)
koine_greek.description: Greek Wikisource hosts many ancient texts in Unicode alongside modern Greek material.

latin.name: The Latin Library
latin.description: The long-standing plain-text collection of classical, medieval, and neo-Latin texts; convenient though without critical apparatus.
latin.api_details: None; simple static HTML, trivially scrapable.

latin.name: Perseus Digital Library (Latin collection)
latin.description: Canonical classical Latin texts with morphology and Lewis and Short integration.
latin.api_details: Same CTS APIs and GitHub TEI (canonical-latinLit) as the Greek side.

latin.name: PHI Latin Texts
latin.description: The authoritative corpus of classical Latin through roughly AD 200, in accurate editions.
latin.api_details: None; terms of use prohibit downloading and scraping.
latin.search_details: Excellent concordance-style word and phrase search.

latin.name: Corpus Corporum
latin.description: Zurich meta-repository of 15,000+ Latin works including a full retyped Patrologia Latina; spans antiquity through neo-Latin.
latin.api_details: Per-work TEI viewing and some export; no documented query API.
latin.search_details: Full-text and lemmatized search across sub-corpora.

latin.name: digilibLT
latin.description: Scholarly digital library of late antique Latin prose with downloadable TEI.

latin.name: Musisque Deoque
latin.description: Latin poetry from its origins to the Renaissance with critical apparatus.

latin.name: dMGH (Monumenta Germaniae Historica digital)
latin.description: The complete MGH volumes online: the foundational editions of medieval Latin historical sources.

latin.name: Documenta Catholica Omnia (Migne Patrologia Latina)
latin.description: Free PDFs of the Migne Patrologia Latina and much other ecclesiastical Latin.

latin.name: CAMENA
latin.description: Early modern (neo-Latin) texts from German-speaking Europe.

latin.name: Bibliotheca Augustana
latin.description: Curated chronological anthology of Latin (and Greek, German, and other) texts.

latin.name: Loebolus
latin.description: Downloadable PDFs of the public domain Loeb Classical Library volumes (Latin and Greek with facing English).
latin.api_details: None; direct PDF links and a bulk archive.
latin.notes: Only pre-copyright-cutoff Loeb volumes; legal because the volumes themselves are public domain in the US.

latin.name: LacusCurtius
latin.description: Bill Thayer's transcriptions of Latin texts and English translations, plus Roman antiquities reference material.

latin.name: Vicifons (Latin Wikisource)
latin.description: Latin Wikisource with classical, medieval, and ecclesiastical texts in Unicode.

biblical_hebrew.name: Sefaria
biblical_hebrew.description: The standard open library for the Hebrew Bible and rabbinic literature: Tanakh, Talmud, midrash, commentaries, and translations, with cross-links.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: Well-documented REST API (texts, links, lexicon, search) plus the complete database exported on GitHub (Sefaria-Export). The best API in this entire list.
biblical_hebrew.search_details: Full-text search in Hebrew and English with morphology-aware tools.

biblical_hebrew.name: Tanach.us (Westminster Leningrad Codex)
biblical_hebrew.description: The Westminster Leningrad Codex, the scholarly baseline Masoretic text, in versioned Unicode XML.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: Static, versioned XML and text downloads of the whole Tanakh; stable URLs per book.

biblical_hebrew.name: Open Scriptures Hebrew Bible (morphhb)
biblical_hebrew.description: The WLC with full morphological tagging and Strong's alignment, CC BY licensed; the go-to machine-readable tagged Hebrew Bible.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: GitHub data (OSIS XML and JSON); hosted reader at hb.openscriptures.org.
biblical_hebrew.search_details: None hosted; designed for local processing.

biblical_hebrew.name: Mechon Mamre
biblical_hebrew.description: Hebrew Bible (Aleppo-tradition text), Mishneh Torah, and other core texts, downloadable as an HTML bundle.

biblical_hebrew.name: BHSA / ETCBC via Text-Fabric and SHEBANQ
biblical_hebrew.description: The Amsterdam linguistic database of the Hebrew Bible: full syntactic and morphological annotation, queryable programmatically.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: Text-Fabric Python package loads the whole annotated corpus; SHEBANQ (shebanq.ancient-data.org) offers hosted MQL queries.
biblical_hebrew.search_details: Structural linguistic queries, far beyond string search.

biblical_hebrew.name: STEP Bible (TAHOT tagged Hebrew OT)
biblical_hebrew.description: Tyndale House's amalgamated tagged Hebrew OT (and Greek NT) data, CC BY.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: GitHub data files; used through the STEP web app.

biblical_hebrew.name: Academic-bible.com (BHS online)
biblical_hebrew.description: Free online reading of the Biblia Hebraica Stuttgartensia.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: None; no downloads (BHS pointing and apparatus are copyrighted).

biblical_hebrew.name: Miqra according to the Masorah (he.wikisource)
biblical_hebrew.description: A modern, openly licensed critical Masoretic edition based on the Aleppo Codex, maintained on Hebrew Wikisource with exportable data.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: MediaWiki API; structured exports circulate on GitHub and via Sefaria.

biblical_hebrew.name: DICTA
biblical_hebrew.description: Israeli research group offering a free library of biblical and rabbinic texts plus NLP tools (vocalization, morphology) for historical Hebrew.
biblical_hebrew.api_details: Public tool APIs for several NLP services; library content via apps.
biblical_hebrew.search_details: Advanced search in the DICTA library tools.

scripture_data_multilingual.name: eBible.org
scripture_data_multilingual.description: Downloadable Bibles in 1,000+ languages, public domain or openly licensed, in USFM, USFX, EPUB, and more.
scripture_data_multilingual.api_details: Bulk file downloads with a consistent directory structure; no query API.

scripture_data_multilingual.name: unfoldingWord / Door43
scripture_data_multilingual.description: Openly licensed (CC BY-SA) biblical texts, translation resources, and lexica designed for reuse.
scripture_data_multilingual.api_details: Door43 content service is a Gitea instance with a catalog API; everything is git-accessible.

scripture_data_multilingual.name: API.Bible
scripture_data_multilingual.description: API gateway to 2,500+ Bible versions in 1,600+ languages, run by the American Bible Society.
scripture_data_multilingual.api_details: REST API with free key; per-version licensing limits apply to redistribution.

pali.name: SuttaCentral
pali.description: The Pali canon and parallels in Sanskrit, Chinese, and Tibetan, with a large body of open modern translations.
pali.api_details: Public JSON API used by the site plus all texts and translations in the Bilara data repositories on GitHub.
pali.search_details: Full-text search across texts and translations.

pali.name: Tipitaka.org (Vipassana Research Institute)
pali.description: The Chattha Sangayana edition of the Pali canon in many scripts, downloadable.
pali.api_details: Offline data and application downloads; community mirrors of the XML exist.

tibetan_classical.name: Buddhist Digital Resource Center (BDRC)
tibetan_classical.description: The central archive of Tibetan literature: millions of scanned pages plus growing e-text, with Chinese, Sanskrit, and Pali materials too.
tibetan_classical.api_details: Open linked-data APIs and IIIF; datasets on GitHub.
tibetan_classical.search_details: Catalog and increasingly full-text search (OCR for Tibetan).

tibetan_classical.name: Lotsawa House
tibetan_classical.description: Thousands of Tibetan Buddhist texts in translation (English and other languages), openly licensed.
tibetan_classical.search_details: Site search by author, topic, and collection.

coptic.name: Coptic Scriptorium
coptic.description: Digitized, richly annotated Coptic texts (biblical, monastic, patristic) built for both reading and computational analysis.
coptic.api_details: Corpora on GitHub; ANNIS search backend exposes query capabilities.

syriac.name: Digital Syriac Corpus
syriac.description: TEI editions of Syriac literature from the classical period onward.

geez_ethiopic.name: Beta masaheft
geez_ethiopic.description: Hamburg-based research environment cataloguing and transcribing Ethiopic (Geez) manuscripts and texts.
geez_ethiopic.api_details: TEI data on GitHub plus REST-style endpoints from the underlying database.

sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.name: ORACC
sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.description: Umbrella for dozens of open cuneiform text corpora (Akkadian, Sumerian) with transliteration and translation.
sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.api_details: Complete open data as JSON downloads per project.

sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.name: ETCSL
sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.description: The Electronic Text Corpus of Sumerian Literature: transliterations and translations of the Sumerian literary canon.
sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.api_details: None; static site (no longer updated but stable).

sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.name: CDLI
sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.description: Cuneiform Digital Library Initiative: catalog, images, and transliterations of hundreds of thousands of tablets.
sumerian_akkadian_cuneiform.api_details: Public API on the rebuilt framework plus data dumps on GitHub.

classical_chinese.cross_reference: See the chinese section: the Chinese Text Project, Kanseki Repository, and CBETA are the primary classical Chinese libraries and all three are listed there.
